sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62706" key="leukope/thlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-πέτηλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62706.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white-leaved</tr_>, Poet.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
